chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – What are rejected, from the witnesses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/250)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/250)
text: لَا يُصَلَّى خَلْفَ مَنْ يَبْتَغِي عَلَى الْأَذَانِ وَ الصَّلَاةِ الْأَجْرَ وَ لَا تُقْبَلُ شَهَادَتُهُ.

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Do not Pray behind the one who wants the payment upon the Azaan and the Prayer, and do not accept his testimony’.
en.sarwar: 11. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith, the following is narrated: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Performing Salat (prayer) behind one who asks payment for saying Adhan (call for Salat (prayer)) and Salat (prayer) and his testimony are not admissible.’”
